chunks.text: Technical Reports - Ana Claudia Arias. Development of in vitro bioelectronic implant aging (EECS-2024-28) Jacob Sporrer. Eco-friendly and Scalable Fabrication of Organic Optoelectronic Sensors () Jasmine Jan. Sensing Systems Using Large Area Printed Organic Electronics (EECS-2023-240) Mahsa Sadeghi and Ana Claudia Arias.
chunks.question: What are the recent technical reports by Ana Claudia Arias?
chunks.answer: Reports on bioelectronic implants and organic electronics.

chunks.text: Modular Integration Platform for Printed Electronics (EECS-2020-156) Seiya Ono. Nitrogen Doped Graphene Nanoribbons for Organic Photovoltaic Applications (EECS-2016-186) Donatela Bellone and Ana Claudia Arias. Characterization and applications of piezoelectric polymers (EECS-2015-253) Tae hoon Kim.
chunks.question: What topics are covered in older technical reports?
chunks.answer: Printed electronics, graphene, and piezoelectric polymers.

chunks.text: A Comprehensive Surface Mount Technology Solution for Integrated Circuits onto Flexible Screen Printed Electrical Interconnects (EECS-2014-113) Meriem Ben Salah Ep Akin. Investigation of Peptoid Thin Films and Their Potential Use in a Biosensor (EECS-2013-111) Brian Lunt, Gloria Olivier, Felippe Pavinatto, Ronald Zuckermann and Ana Claudia Arias.
chunks.question: What are the earliest technical reports listed?
chunks.answer: Surface mount technology and peptoid biosensors.
